headline: P&L exposure: ₹11.5 Cr compliance cost (engine estimate); potential ₹500-1,000 Cr green bond window (speculative, engine estimate)
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; event is direct to JSW Energy's balance sheet.
Possible P/E premium of 0.0-0.1x if CDP/TCFD scores improve; no immediate margin erosion.
Potential for 20-40 bps lower cost of capital if EU Taxonomy/green financing is accessed, but only if disclosures are robust.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹11.5 Cr compliance cost (engine estimate); potential ₹500-1,000 Cr green bond window (speculative, engine estimate)
